entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Legume crops important for global food security and agricultural sustainability

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY OF AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The ability of agricultural systems to maintain productivity and ecological balance over time

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, noted as low and unstable in legumes compared to cereals

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Non-legume grain crops used as a benchmark for yield comparison

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA, used to drive crop improvement

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED APPROACHES
entities.description: Strategies utilizing genomic data to accelerate the development of crop varieties

entities.name: AGRICULTURALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Desirable characteristics in crops that enhance productivity and quality

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genome-wide markers to predict the breeding value of genotypes

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Organized efforts to enhance the genetic makeup of crops for better performance

entities.name: LINE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The phenotypic and genetic performance of specific breeding lines

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to shorten the generation time of crops to accelerate breeding

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A specific legume crop used in hybrid breeding and heterosis studies

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A specific legume crop used in hybrid breeding and heterosis studies

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon where hybrid offspring exhibit superior traits compared to their parents

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: The process of crossing genetically diverse parents to produce superior hybrid offspring

entities.name: SEQUENCE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: A strategy combining population improvement, genomic selection, and GWAS

entities.name: POPULATION IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the overall genetic quality of a breeding population

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association studies used to link genetic markers to specific traits

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers and genomic tools to improve crop varieties

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: The use of controlled environments to accelerate the plant growth cycle
